scriptLines:
query: 'Select 
[Date]                                        as [PerformanceDate]          ,
[Data_Source_type]                  as [DataSourcetype]         ,
[Currency]                          as [Currency]               ,
[Cost]                              as [Cost]                   ,
[Clicks]                            as [Clicks]                 ,
[Impressions]                       as [Impressions]            ,
[Account]                           as [AccountID]            ,
[Ad]                                as [AdName]                 ,
[Ad_Group]                          as [AdGroupName]            ,
[Campaign]                          as [CampaignName]           ,
[Media_type]                        as [Mediatype]              ,
[Paid__Organic]                     as [PaidOrganic]            ,
[Traffic_source]                    as [Trafficsource]          ,
[Data_Source_name]                  as [DataSourcename]         ,
[Data_Source]                       as [DataSource]             ,
[Data_Source_type_name]             as [DataSourcetypename]     ,
[Day_of_week]                       as [Dayofweek]              ,
[Month]                             as [Month]                  ,
[Week]                              as [Week]                   ,
[Year]                              as [Year]                   ,
[Week_number]                       as [Week_number]            ,
[Conversions]                       as [Conversions]            ,
[Ad_Group_ID]                       as [AdGroupID]              ,
[AD_ID]                             as [ADID]                   ,
[Campaign_ID]                       as [CampaignID]             ,
[Market]                            as [Market]                 ,
[Leads]                             as [Leads]                  ,
[Ad_Created_Time]                   as [AdCreatedTime]          ,
[Ad_End_Time]                       as [AdEndTime]              ,
[Ad_set_End_Time]                   as [AdsetEndTime]           ,
[Ad_set_Start_Time]                 as [AdsetStartTime]         ,
[Ad_Start_Time]                     as [AdStartTime]            ,
[Campaign_End_Time]                 as [CampaignEndTime]        ,
[Campaign_Start_Time]               as [CampaignStartTime]      ,
[Ad_set_Effective_Status]           as [AdsetEffectiveStatus]   ,
[Campaign_Effective_Status]         as [CampaignEffectiveStatus],
[Ad_Effective_Status]               as [AdEffectiveStatus]      ,
[Ad_Creative_Asset_Links]           as [AdCreativeAssetLinks]   ,
[Ad_Creative_Link]                  as [AdCreativeLink]         ,
[Attribution_Setting]               as [AttributionSetting]     ,
[Buying_Type]                       as [BuyingType]             ,
[Campaign_Objective]                as [CampaignObjective]      ,
[Link]                              as [AdLink]                 ,
[Optimization_Goal]                 as [OptimizationGoal]       ,
[Creative_Object_Type]              as [CreativeObjectType]


from 

[ODS].[FUNNEL_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS_DETAILS]',
